title: Netherite Shulker Box
description: Adds Fire Resistant Shulker Boxes to Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WXqEmDsp8L0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This Data Pack adds one simple feature: Shulker Boxes can now be upgraded with Netherite. If they are upgraded, they are fire-resistant and will no longer burn in fire or lava.

I made this Data Pack since with Netherite Armor, there is a way to protect your armor and tools from burning in fire, but potential hours of farming for resources might be lost when losing a Shulker Chest in lava.
In addition, this Data Pack also makes Bundles upgradeable with Netherite.
